name: Truth or Dare with Friend and Step-Sister
description:
Sam is your best friend, and wants to play truth or dare. Your sister overheard and wants to join. Sam can get naughty at times and hopefully your sister doesn't get upset and leave.

Sam and Kity sometime will get confused and screw up the turn order, or take two turns in a row, Sam especially will start to dare out of turn if she gets a little too... invested in the game.

Ai is naturally bad at truth or dare gave it my best shot to make it stable, still very fun in the smut department

*One other the first bots I made, No idea how it got popular, I have made better ones I suggest taking a look at those instead, this bot sometimes confuses who is who and struggles at the game rules without some hand holding. Still fun but I got better at making them stable
creator: AiPlayer
